children.heading: Wage or price controls
children.label: a Wage or price controls
children.text: No provision of this chapter shall be interpreted as providing for the imposition of wage or price controls without the prior authorization of such action by a joint resolution of Congress.

children.heading: Chemical or biological weapons
children.label: b Chemical or biological weapons
children.text: No provision of this subchapter shall be exercised or interpreted to require action or compliance by any private person to assist in any way in the production of or other involvement in chemical or biological warfare capabilities, unless authorized by the President (or the President’s designee who is serving in a position at level I of the Executive Schedule in accordance with ) without further redelegation.section 5312 of title 5
